declaration.rationale: Typo-only edit in a non-canonical public docs page.
declaration.residual_risk: low; reviewer should confirm diff is typo-only

declaration.rationale: Adds candidate governance language but does not change runtime behavior.
declaration.review_route: non-author review comment before ready-for-review promotion
declaration.residual_risk: candidate language could be overread as canon

declaration.rationale: Introduces schema identifiers and candidate namespace terms.
declaration.review_route: operator or delegated reviewer plus CodeRabbit
declaration.residual_risk: schema names may become sticky before namespace audit

declaration.rationale: Touches release or security posture and may affect external consumers.
declaration.source_of_record: operator instruction plus linked high-consequence issue
declaration.review_route: operator approval and non-author review required
declaration.residual_risk: must hold if reviewer capacity or source evidence is insufficient
